creator: samir.otmane@numericable.fr
text:
Hello everyone,

I'd like to get rid of some kernel features that i don't need/not necessary but yet there's no options for getting them disabled upon looking inside the NOTES configuration file (I'm thinking about jailing for instance but there might be others)

I'm aware of WITHOUT_JAIL entry in src.conf but it only affects user-land program tools.

Thank you in advance for answers

Samir
